who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts and late payments. We provide a dashboard instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and analyzing procurement spend effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on procurement workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try invoice aggregation and monthly trend reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the dashboard
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
